---
title: "Image Gallery"
---

## Ravenshaw University
Exploring the campus and life at Ravenshaw University.

![](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/pulakeshpradhan/raw/main/ravenshaw.jpg){.lightbox width="100%" group="ravenshaw"}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/Ravenshaw/rugeo1.jpeg){.lightbox group="ravenshaw-gallery"}
![](images/Ravenshaw/rugeo2.jpeg){.lightbox group="ravenshaw-gallery"}
:::

## ANVESHAN Student Research Convention

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/Ravenshaw/1.jpg){.lightbox group="anveshan"}
![](images/Ravenshaw/2.jpg){.lightbox group="anveshan"}
:::

## IIT Bombay
Visit to IIT Bombay for research and collaboration.

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/IIT%20Bombay/1.jpg){.lightbox group="iitb"}
![](images/IIT%20Bombay/2.jpg){.lightbox group="iitb"}
:::

## Ganpat University (GUNI), Gujarat

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/Ganpat%20University/guni1.jpeg){.lightbox group="guni"}
![](images/Ganpat%20University/guni4.JPG){.lightbox group="guni"}
:::

## BHU (GEE Workshop)
Google Earth Engine workshop conducted at Banaras Hindu University.

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/BHU/BHU4.jpg){.lightbox group="bhu"}
![](images/BHU/BHU3.jpg){.lightbox group="bhu"}
:::

## NAGI (Ranchi University)

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI1.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI2.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI3.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
![](images/NAGI/NAGI4.jpg){.lightbox group="nagi"}
:::

## Featured Events & Research

::: {layout-ncol=1}
[![](images/gdg.jpg){.lightbox group="featured"}](https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/)
:::

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University](images/resource2.jpg){.lightbox group="resource"}
![Centurion University](images/resource1.png){.lightbox group="resource"}
:::
